rows.label: qev025902_MSG0001
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025902_JNK0010
rows.name: Check Life

rows.label: qev025902_SEL0011
rows.name: Call out to Staccata to see if he's alive.

rows.label: qev025902_JNK0020
rows.name: Mourn

rows.label: qev025902_SEL0021
rows.name: Lament Staccata's death and offer a prayer.

rows.label: qev025902_MSG0002
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025902_MSG0003
rows.name: ...I was waiting for you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025902_MSG0004
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025902_MSG0005
rows.name:
...What are you praying to?
Don't tell me it's the God of Miracles, is it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025902_MSG0006
rows.name: Phew...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025902_MSG0007
rows.name:
While Staccata was playing dead, Ma-non were being killed off
one by one right beside me. I thought I was a goner, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025902_MSG0008
rows.name:
I believed that you would surely come, you know.
This is all thanks to Jilinbo, isn't it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025902_MSG0009
rows.name:
...Fraisie is further inside.
Please, stop her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025902_MSG0010
rows.name:
It has nothing to do with God anymore... She is already...
nothing more than a mass murderer.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025902_MSG0011
rows.name: Fraisie has been killing Ma-non, calling it a "ritual"...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025902_MSG0012
rows.name:
She is no longer even a religious zealot.
She is just... a mass murderer.
Please, you have to stop her...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025902_MSG0013
rows.name:
An alien disguised as the avatar of God...
I don't know who they are, but
you must chase them down and finish them off![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025902_MSG0014
rows.name:
If we let that thing go, it will only give birth
to a second or third Fraisie, won't it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025902_MSG0015
rows.name:
...Is it over?
The one who incited the Ma-non... and Fraisie... is gone, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025902_MSG0016
rows.name: ...I see. Thank goodness...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025902_MSG0017
rows.name:
...Still, an alien that can freely change its shape.
To think a guy like that was the mastermind behind all this...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025902_MSG0018
rows.name:
You don't think they've disguised themselves as other Earthlings...
do you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025902_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev025902_SEL0031
rows.name: Assure him that at least you and your friends are fine.

rows.label: qev025902_JNK0040
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev025902_SEL0041
rows.name: Express concern that there might be others.

rows.label: qev025902_JNK0010
rows.name: [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025902_MSG0019
rows.name:
You're right.
There are wonderful people like you out there.
Earthlings are not like those aliens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025902_MSG0020
rows.name:
Staccata will keep a closer watch from now on.
I won't let an alien like that kill Ma-non ever again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025902_MSG0021
rows.name:
Aah... God of Miracles!
Grant me your words...!
Hurry and destroy these demons![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025902_MSG0022
rows.name:
...Fraisie, that thing is already dead.
The God of Miracles never existed, you know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025902_MSG0023
rows.name:
Aaaaaaah! I do not believe it!
I will absolutely never believe the lies of a demon like you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025902_MSG0024
rows.name:
Phew... What a pitiful woman.
There's nothing Staccata can do for her.
I'll leave the rest to you BLADEs.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025902_MSG0025
rows.name:
...Well then, let's head back.
I'm sure Jilinbo is worried too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025902_MSG0026
rows.name:
Fraisie has been handed over to the Companions.
But still... she seemed to genuinely believe that the God of Miracles
would come to save her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025902_MSG0027
rows.name: What a truly foolish and pitiful Earthling...[ST:wait ]
